name: Accessibility State Managed
description: Interactive components with ARIA state (expanded, selected, checked, disabled) must manage state transitions correctly. Focus management after state changes should be verified.
rationale: Incorrect ARIA state causes accessibility tools to report wrong information. A dropdown that sets aria-expanded=true but never sets it back to false on close is broken for screen reader users.

examples.passes: Formalize(dropdown ARIA states) → Verify(expanded/collapsed transitions are symmetric: proved)
examples.fails: Accordion component where aria-expanded is set on open but not cleared on close
